rationale_for_uncovered: Per Children Inc demo prep decision (2026-05-21), Section 1 of the notes is prioritized at full depth (REQ-001 to REQ-004 with must_demo: true). Sections 2-4 (correspondence, donor notes/financials, content/MCAE, portals) are aspirational coverage with must_demo: false — they remain in scope as 'and here's what else you can do' beats if time permits within the 30-min duration but are not gating coverage for Phase 4 SHIP. REQ-005 through REQ-017 will be addressed in a follow-up demo or in Phase 7's presenter guide as supplementary material.
